case_title: PHAROAH DANIELS VS. PARK MERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES, LLC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DANIELS, PHAROAH AS TO DEFENDANT PARK MERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES, LLC.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DANIELS, PHAROAH ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,533.00 FILED BY DANIELS, PHAROAH AS TO DEFENDANT PARK MERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-15-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-15-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DANIELS, PHAROAH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PARK MERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES, LLC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-11-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PARK MERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES, LLC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED MAR-29-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PARK MERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES, LLC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PARK MERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-15-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-15-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DONNA STERN-PROPERTY MANAGER,NICHOLE FLORETTI-LEASING MGR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
